title: Podman overrides the storage options in /etc with the default ones from /usr/share
body:
### Issue Description

Podman overrides (?) the driver option in /etc/containers/storage.conf with the default one in /usr/share/containers/storage.conf.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

It simply started to complain about driver mismach after an upgrade to `podman version 4.4.0-dev` on arch linux.

When trying to start an already existing container (with root priv.):

```
$ podman start ...
ERRO[0000] User-selected graph driver "overlay" overwritten by graph driver "btrfs" from database - delete libpod local files ("/var/lib/containers/storage") to resolve.  May prevent use of images created by other tools 
Error: unknown option overlay.mountopt
```

```
$ grep driver /etc/containers/storage.conf
driver = "btrfs"
```

```
$ grep driver /usr/share/containers/storage.conf
driver = "overlay"
```

### Describe the results you received

`strace` shows it opens the latter later.

```
[pid 15858] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/etc/containers/storage.conf", {st_mode=S_IFREG|0644, st_size=10144, ...}, 0) = 0                                                                   
[pid 15858] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/etc/containers/storage.conf", {st_mode=S_IFREG|0644, st_size=10144, ...}, 0) = 0                                                                   
[pid 15858] openat(AT_FDCWD, "/etc/containers/storage.conf", O_RDONLY|O_CLOEXEC) = 3                                                                                                  
[pid 15858] epoll_ctl(4, EPOLL_CTL_ADD, 3, {events=EPOLLIN|EPOLLOUT|EPOLLRDHUP|EPOLLET, data={u32=4011310328, u64=140419377118456}}) = -1 EPERM (Operation not permitted)
[pid 15858] read(3, "# This file is the configuration"..., 512) = 512                                                                                                                 
[pid 15858] read(3, "ers/storage.conf (If XDG_CONFIG_"..., 384) = 384                      
[pid 15858] read(3, "hanging the graphroot location o"..., 512) = 512                                                                                                                 
[pid 15858] read(3, "his is faster, but doesn't persi"..., 640) = 640                      
[pid 15858] read(3, "nk to the existing file when it "..., 1024) = 1024                                                                                                               
[pid 15858] read(3, "ing from UIDs/GIDs as they shoul"..., 1024) = 1024                                                                                                               
[pid 15858] read(3, "oot-auto-userns-user is a user n"..., 1280) = 1280                                                                                                               
[pid 15859] <... nanosleep resumed>NULL) = 0                                               
[pid 15859] nanosleep({tv_sec=0, tv_nsec=320000},  <unfinished ...>                        
[pid 15858] read(3, "for mounting the file system ins"..., 1536) = 1536                    
[pid 15858] read(3, "ntal feature, it could change in"..., 2560) = 2560                                                                                                               
[pid 15858] read(3, "\n\n# use_deferred_deletion marks "..., 2816) = 672                   
[pid 15858] read(3, "", 2144)           = 0                                                
[pid 15858] close(3)                    = 0                                                
[pid 15858] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/usr/share/containers/storage.conf", {st_mode=S_IFREG|0644, st_size=10148, ...}, 0) = 0
[pid 15858] newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, "/usr/share/containers/storage.conf", {st_mode=S_IFREG|0644, st_size=10148, ...}, 0) = 0
[pid 15858] openat(AT_FDCWD, "/usr/share/containers/storage.conf", O_RDONLY|O_CLOEXEC) = 3 
[pid 15858] epoll_ctl(4, EPOLL_CTL_ADD, 3, {events=EPOLLIN|EPOLLOUT|EPOLLRDHUP|EPOLLET, data={u32=4011310328, u64=140419377118456}}) = -1 EPERM (Operation not permitted)
[pid 15858] read(3, "# This file is the configuration"..., 512) = 512                      
[pid 15858] read(3, "ers/storage.conf (If XDG_CONFIG_"..., 384) = 384                      
[pid 15858] read(3, " changing the graphroot location"..., 512) = 512                      
[pid 15859] <... nanosleep resumed>NULL) = 0                                               
[pid 15858] read(3, " This is faster, but doesn't per"..., 640) = 640                      
[pid 15859] nanosleep({tv_sec=0, tv_nsec=640000},  <unfinished ...>                        
[pid 15858] read(3, "link to the existing file when i"..., 1024) = 1024                    
[pid 15858] read(3, "mapping from UIDs/GIDs as they s"..., 1024) = 1024                    
[pid 15858] read(3, "\n# Root-auto-userns-user is a us"..., 1280) = 1280                   
[pid 15858] read(3, "use for mounting the file system"..., 1536) = 1536                                                                                                               
[pid 15858] read(3, "rimental feature, it could chang"..., 2560) = 2560                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
[pid 15858] read(3, "rue\"\n\n# use_deferred_deletion ma"..., 2816) = 676                  
[pid 15858] read(3, "", 2140)           = 0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
[pid 15858] close(3)
```

### Describe the results you expected

I'd expect the `/etc/...` configurations to override the defaults in `/usr/share/...` so that "user selected driver" is `btrfs`. It even shows the `/etc/...` config is used in `podman info` but it's not effective.

### podman info output

```yaml
$ podman info
ERRO[0000] User-selected graph driver "overlay" overwritten by graph driver "btrfs" from database - delete libpod local files ("/var/lib/containers/storage") to resolve.  May prevent use of images created by other tools 
Error: unknown option overlay.mountopt
```

```
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Privileged

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

Arch Linux

### Additional information

Weirdly, rootless containers still start fine.

comments.body: I've just done a git build and it seems to work fine on main `podman version 4.5.0-dev`. Closing.

I've dug out that https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/f65d79f4c78b5f42c65e6a9c43fe4b800b2e8fcb (https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/f64e1bd14ae9e8694c4ead537569d139853d32bc) is the fix of this issue. Maybe it helps people to backport.
